pages.text: Binggui Zhou Links: Google Scholar | Research Gate | Github | Curriculum Vitae Affiliation: 1）Ph. D. Student with the SKL-IOTSC and Department of ECE, University of Macau; 2）Research Assiatant with the SISSE, Jinan University Email: binggui.zhou@connect.um.edu.mo Address: Room 5004, Building N21, University of Macau, Avenida da Universidade, Taipa, Macao SAR, China Research Highlights To be updated. News [2023-05-17] We (Binggui Zhou, Kehui Li, Chengzhi Ma, Chengwang Ji, and Prof. Shaodan Ma) won the Winning Prize of the First 6G Intelligent Wireless Communication System Competition held by the IMT-2030 (6G) Promotion Group and Guangdong OPPO Mobile Communications Corp., Ltd. [2022-04-24] We (Binggui Zhou and Prof. Shaodan Ma) won the Silver Prize of the First 6G AI Competition held by the Guangdong OPPO Mobile Communications Corp., Ltd.

Hi there, this is Binggui Zhou I’m currently a Ph.D. student in Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE) with the SKL-IOTSC and Department of ECE, University of Macau, Macao SAR, China; and also a Research Assistant with the SISSE, Jinan University, Zhuhai, China. I’m co-supervised by Prof. Shaodan Ma (SMIEEE, Assistant Director of SKL-IOTSC) and Prof. Guanghua Yang (FIET, SMIEEE, Associate Dean of SISSE), and working on Artifical Intelligence towards Intelligent Wireless Communications. I also collaborate closely with Prof. Xi Yang (Young Professor, East China Normal University) on Intelligent Wireless Communications. Previously, I obtained my Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering (EE) from Jinan University, Zhuhai, China and Master of Science in ECE from University of Macau, Macao SAR, China.

Group Activities | Moments Group Activities [2023-05-22] We won the Champion of the first Badminton Competition held by the SKL-IOTSC! [2023-03-05] A group photo took on 2023-03-05 when we were having a team building activity on Guishan Island, Zhuhai, China ! [2022-09-09] Groupmates expressed thanks to Prof. Shaodan Ma on the day before Teachers Day! Moments [2023-06-10] After nearly 4 years, I feel very excited to visit my alma mater Jinan University (Zhuhai Campus) today! [2023-05-18] Glad to attend the awards ceremony of the First 6G Intelligent Wireless Communication System Competition held by the IMT-2030 (6G) Promotion Group in Shanghai, China. [2023-04-09] Lovely dog and cat! [2023-01-01] Happy New Year 2023! Greetings from Macau! [2022-10-06] Very happy to attend my friend’s wedding ceremony and have a short trip during the National Day Holiday in Chaoshan!
